overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking along a stone causeway at night in ancient Alexandria. The character passes through a triumphal arch with the Lighthouse of Alexandria visible in the distance, then transitions onto a dirt path lined with palm trees and vegetation.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone causeway toward the large triumphal arch with lit braziers

entered.detail: large stone archway with lit braziers on top, dominating the forward view
tall stone wall running along the left side of the causeway
low stone railing along the right edge of the causeway
wide paved stone path with weathered tiles

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide stone causeway at night, approaching an impressive triumphal arch illuminated by fire braziers. The path is flanked by a high stone wall on the left and a low railing on the right, with the arch structure creating a partial canopy overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open causeway with lighthouse view and marble statues

events.description: passes through the triumphal arch into the open area beyond
lighthouse of alexandria becomes clearly visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing along the causeway with the lighthouse now visible to the right, passing white marble statues

entered.detail: tall white tower with a glowing light at the top, visible in the distance
white marble statues on pedestals flanking the causeway

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the arch, the scene opens to reveal the Lighthouse of Alexandria glowing in the distance on the right. The character continues along the stone-paved causeway, passing white marble statues positioned along both sides as the sky opens up overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from stone to dirt with palm trees

events.description: camels cross the path ahead from right to left
ground surface transitions from stone paving to dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking along the path as it transitions from stone to dirt, approaching camels crossing ahead

notable_agents.action: camels walking across the path from right to left

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the path
unpaved dirt surface replacing the stone tiles

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions as the stone paving gives way to a dirt path lined with palm trees. The lighthouse fades from view in the distance, and a group of camels crosses the path ahead. White statues continue to dot the landscape on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path with ancient ruins and vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path surrounded by dense vegetation and approaching ancient ruins

entered.detail: distant stone ruins with columns visible on the horizon
abandoned wooden wagon with large wheels sitting off the path
dense bushes and undergrowth lining the right side

segments.scene_description: The path becomes fully rural with dense vegetation and palm trees surrounding the dirt trail. An abandoned wooden cart sits on the left, while ancient temple ruins become visible in the distance ahead. The stone architecture of the causeway is now completely behind, replaced by natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a formal stone causeway into a rural, overgrown landscape at night. It begins with the character walking along a wide stone path toward a triumphal arch illuminated by fire braziers, flanked by a high wall and a low railing. As the camera passes through the arch, the scene opens to reveal the glowing Lighthouse of Alexandria in the distance while the character moves past white marble statues under an open sky. The environment then shifts as the stone paving gives way to a dirt path lined with palm trees, where a group of camels crosses the trail and the lighthouse fades from view. Finally, the path becomes fully rural, moving past an abandoned wooden cart and dense vegetation toward ancient temple ruins in the distance.
